38:1:1.m: A letter used to begin this chapter

صٓ: A letter used to begin this chapter

38:1:2.m: By The Quran! (as an oath connected to ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ after it)

38:3:4.m: before them (referring to the previous generations mentioned in قَرْنٍ)

38:3:8.m: and there is not (with extra emphasis)

38:4:7.m: the rejecters/deniers of truth (subject of قَالَ - said)

38:5:1.m: did he make (the gods into one god)?

38:5:2.m: the deities (object of أَجَعَلَ - did he make)

38:6:1.m: and he set out/went forth (subject of the sentence)

38:7:2.m: we heard (referring to what was said about هٰذَا)

ى: extends the meaning to show being completely inside something

38:8:14.m: they taste (referring to the disbelievers in شَكٍّ)

38:8:15.m: My punishment (what is being tasted in يَذُوقُوا)

38:9:6.m: The Mighty One (attribute of Allah, connected to الْوَهَّابِ)

38:10:3.m: ownership/dominion (subject of لَهُم - belongs to them)

38:12:1.m: she strongly denied something as false

38:12:2.m: before them (referring to the deniers mentioned in كَذَّبَتْ)

38:12:3.m: people, folk (subject of كَذَّبَتْ - they denied)

38:13:4.m: and companions (connected to وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ - Thamud and the people of Lot)

38:13:6.m: those (pointing to something far and addressing someone)

ئِكَ: (pointing to something far and addressing someone)

38:15:1.m: and not (they are waiting for يَنظُرُ)

38:15:10.m: any pause/delay (in the context of 'they will have no pause/delay')

38:16:2.m: O our lord (subject of قَالُوا/they said)

38:16:4.m: for/to us (emphasizing their request to عَجِّل)

38:16:8.m: of the reckoning (possessed by يَوْمِ - day)

38:17:2.m: upon/on/over (connects to مَا يَقُولُونَ - what they say)

38:17:5.m: and remember! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

38:18:1.m: indeed we (subject of سَخَّرْنَا - we subjected)

38:18:2.m: We completely controlled (the mountains mentioned in ٱلْجِبَالَ)

38:18:5.m: they (feminine) glorify intensely (subject of the mountains in إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ)

38:18:7.m: and the shining (of sunrise) (connected to بِٱلْعَشِىِّ)

38:19:2.m: gathered (feminine, as a state/description of الطير)

38:19:5.m: one who constantly returns (to Allah) (describing كُلٌّ)

38:21:1.m: and has/did (asking about أَتَىٰكَ - came to you)

38:21:2.m: he came to you (referring to the news/story that follows)

38:21:4.m: the opponent (part of the story/news mentioned in نَبَؤُا۟)

38:21:7.m: the place of prayer/worship (object of تَسَوَّرُوا)

38:22:4.m: David (as the object being entered upon in this ayah)

38:22:5.m: and so he became suddenly afraid (of them)

38:22:7.m: they said (referring to the group who entered upon داود)

38:23:2.m: this (pointing to something near) (brother of أَخِى)

38:23:11.m: so he said (connected to previous statement)

38:23:12.m: put her in my care (referring to the one sheep mentioned)

38:24:3.m: he wronged you (referring to one of two disputants speaking to داود)

38:24:7.m: his female sheep (owned by the one with your single ewe)

38:24:13.m: some of them (as subject of يَبْغِى - transgresses)

38:24:21.m: and few/little ones (connecting to 'those who believe' إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)

38:24:29.m: his master who cares for him (being asked forgiveness from)

38:24:32.m: and he turned back in repentance

38:25:5.m: for him (connected to فَغَفَرْنَا - so we forgave)

38:25:7.m: surely a special closeness (near عِندَنَا - with Us)

38:25:9.m: a place of return (connected to حُسْنَ - excellence)

38:26:4.m: a successor (object of جَعَلْنٰكَ - we made you)

38:26:13.m: the desire/whim (that leads away from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ)

38:26:14.m: so he leads you astray (from سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)

38:26:17.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to سَبِيلِ - path)

38:26:20.m: they wander off the right path

38:26:23.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to سَبِيلِ - path)

38:26:24.m: for them (who stray from Allah's path)

38:27:4.m: and the earth (object of خَلَقْنَا - we created)

38:27:6.m: between them both (referring to السَّمَآءَ and الْأَرْضَ)

38:27:12.m: then woe (expression of warning or threat)

38:28:2.m: we make/set (addressing the disbelievers' assumption in أَمْ)

38:28:7.m: like the people who cause damage/harm (object being compared to ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟)

38:28:13.m: like the wicked ones (being compared to الْمُتَّقِينَ - the righteous)

38:29:2.m: we sent it down (referring to كِتٰبٌ - the book)

38:29:3.m: to you (the one being addressed in أَنزَلْنٰهُ)

كَ: you (the one being addressed in أَنزَلْنٰهُ)

38:29:7.m: and so that he may take heed

38:31:1.m: when (referring to a past event: عُرِضَ - was displayed)

إِذْ: when (referring to a past event: عُرِضَ - was displayed)

38:31:2.m: it was displayed (subject of the sentence)

38:31:5.m: the noble horses standing still (feminine plural, subject)

38:32:3.m: I preferred (حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ - the love of good things)

38:32:6.m: away from (connects حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ to ذِكْرِ رَبِّى)

38:34:3.m: Solomon (the prophet, as the object being tested)

سُلَيْمٰنَ: Solomon (the prophet, as the object being tested)

38:34:7.m: a body (object of أَلْقَيْنَا - we placed)

38:34:9.m: he turned back (to Allah in repentance)

38:35:6.m: to me/for me (object of وَهَبْ - grant)

38:35:15.m: The Most Giving (a name/attribute of Allah)

38:36:1.m: and so We made (something) serve (connected to الرِّيحَ - the wind)

38:37:2.m: every, all (describing what is being acted upon in this ayah)

38:37:3.m: a master builder (one of many given to سليمن)

38:38:2.m: those who are bound/chained (multiple males, connected to آخَرِينَ - others)

38:39:3.m: so give gifts/favors! (connected to عَطَآؤُنَا - our gift)

38:40:2.m: for him (connected to عِندَنَا - with us)

38:40:3.m: with us (possessed by له - for him)

38:40:6.m: a place of return (in the context of وَحُسْنَ - and goodness of)

38:42:3.m: this (pointing to مُغْتَسَلٌۢ - a place to wash)

38:43:6.m: mercy (as a gift from مِّنَّا - from Us)

38:43:8.m: and a reminder (connected to رَحْمَةً - mercy)

38:43:10.m: the minds/intellects (possessed by those who understand)

38:44:1.m: and take! (connected to فَٱضْرِب - and strike)

38:44:2.m: with your hand (object used to strike)

38:44:5.m: with it (connected to فَٱضْرِب - so strike)

38:44:14.m: one who constantly returns (in repentance) (as subject)

38:45:1.m: and remember! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to remember what follows)

38:45:8.m: and of the visions/insights (possessed by أُو۟لِى)

38:47:1.m: and indeed they (are among the chosen ones)

38:47:2.m: with us (in the phrase 'they are with us')

38:47:5.m: of the excellent ones (part of مِنَ)

38:48:8.m: the excellent ones (describing إِسْمٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ)

38:49:4.m: for those who protect themselves (against evil)

38:49:6.m: a place of return (possessed by حُسْنَ)

38:51:1.m: ones who are reclining comfortably (refers to the blessed people in paradise)

ينَ: (refers to the blessed people in paradise)

38:51:3.m: they call/are calling (referring to the blessed people in Paradise)

38:51:5.m: with a fruit (that they will enjoy)

38:52:2.m: females who limit their gaze (subject of أَتْرَابٌ)

38:53:1.m: this (pointing to something nearby) (subject of مَا تُوعَدُونَ - what you are promised)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to something nearby) (subject of مَا تُوعَدُونَ - what you are promised)

38:53:3.m: you (all) are promised (what is mentioned before in هٰذَا مَا)

38:54:2.m: this (referring to رِزْق - provision - mentioned next)

38:55:3.m: for the ones who cross boundaries

38:55:5.m: a place of return (owned by شَرَّ)

38:56:1.m: Hell (as the object being entered in يَصْلَوْنَهَا - they will enter it)

38:56:2.m: they enter/burn in it (referring to جَهَنَّمَ)

38:56:4.m: the resting place (subject of بِئْسَ - how wretched)

38:57:4.m: and a dark, cold flowing substance (paired with حَمِيمٌ/boiling water)

38:59:2.m: a group (subject of مُّقْتَحِمٌ - rushing in)

38:59:3.m: one who forcefully enters (with emphasis, describes فَوْجٌ/group)

38:59:10.m: of the fire (object of مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ)

38:60:6.m: with/by you all (who are not welcomed)

38:60:10.m: and how bad! and what an evil thing! (criticizing ٱلْقَرَارُ/the settlement)

بِئْسَ: how bad! what an evil thing!

38:60:11.m: the place to settle/stay (subject of بِئْسَ - how evil)

38:61:2.m: Our Lord! (being called upon by those speaking in قَالُوا)

38:61:3.m: who (asking about the one who brought forth)

38:61:8.m: punishment (object of فَزِدْهُ - so increase it)

38:62:7.m: we were (subject of نَعُدُّهُم/we used to count them)

38:63:3.m: or (connecting to أَتَّخَذْنٰهُمْ - did we take them)

38:65:2.m: only/just (introducing what the Prophet ﷺ says about himself)

38:65:3.m: I (in the context of 'I am only a warner')

38:65:11.m: The Supreme Overpowerer (one of Allah's names)

38:66:3.m: and the earth (connected to ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - the heavens)

38:66:6.m: The Mighty One (a name of Allah)

38:66:7.m: The Oft-Forgiving One (attribute of اللَّهِ, subject of this phrase)

38:68:1.m: you all (who are turning away from عَنْهُ)

38:68:2.m: away from him/about him (object of مُعْرِضُونَ - turning away)

38:68:3.m: those who turn away (subject of أَنتُمْ)

38:69:2.m: he was (negated by مَا before it)

38:69:5.m: any knowledge (of بِٱلْمَلَإِ - about the highest assembly)

38:70:5.m: that indeed (introducing what is revealed to the Prophet ﷺ)

38:70:7.m: a warner (describes Prophet Muhammad ﷺ as one who warns people about Allah's punishment)

38:71:4.m: to the angels (who Allah is addressing)

38:71:8.m: from/of (shows what بَشَرًا is made of, with emphasis)

ن: shows what بَشَرًا is made of

38:71:9.m: clay/mud (being used to create from) (material for بَشَرًا)

ٍ: (being used to create from) (material for بَشَرًا)

38:72:2.m: I shaped him perfectly (with special care)

38:72:3.m: and I blew/breathed (connects to سَوَّيْتُهُۥ - 'I fashioned him')

38:73:1.m: so he bowed down with his forehead touching the ground

جَدَ: bowed down with his forehead touching the ground

38:73:2.m: the angels (as the ones who prostrated in فَسَجَدَ)

ةُ: (as the ones who prostrated in فَسَجَدَ)

َ: (as the object being excepted by إِلَّآ)

38:75:2.m: O Iblis! (being addressed by قَالَ - He said)

38:75:6.m: that you bow down in worship (to مَا)

38:76:1.m: he said (introducing what Iblis/Satan says next)

38:76:5.m: you created me (said by Iblis to Allah)

38:76:9.m: from (showing what something is made of)

38:77:2.m: so exit! (command to one male) (after قَالَ)

38:77:5.m: an outcast/one who is driven away

38:78:6.m: of the judgment (possessed by يَوْمِ - Day)

38:80:4.m: the ones who are given time

38:82:1.m: he said (followed by فَبِعِزَّتِكَ - 'so by Your might')

38:82:3.m: I will most definitely lead them astray

38:82:4.m: all together (as objects of لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will mislead them)

ينَ: (as objects of لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ - I will mislead them)

38:83:4.m: the purified/chosen ones (describing عِبَادَكَ - Your servants)

38:84:3.m: and the truth (object of أَقُولُ - I say)

38:85:2.m: Hell (object of لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)

38:85:5.m: he followed you (referring to the one being addressed in this statement)

38:85:6.m: from them (referring to those who follow شيطان)

38:86:7.m: and not (connected to أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)

38:86:10.m: the ones who burden themselves unnecessarily (after مِنَ)

38:87:3.m: except/but (excluding this Quran from being anything other than a reminder)

إِلَّا: except/but (excluding this Quran from being anything other than a reminder)

38:88:1.m: and you will surely know (with absolute certainty)
